text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a reward for her working so hard every day, we
go to a popular cake shop on our way back after
a day out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A thirty-minute wait... I should've expected as
much, seeing how popular this place is. But we've
finally reached the front.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the cake is extremely popular, and only a
limited number are sold each day! Every time I go
by this place, I yearn for—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... I mean, it has caught my eye and I've
been slightly curious.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's finally our turn! I'm feeling kinda guilty
about this though.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Short Hair
text_block_list.text:
I know! It has as many calories as three bowls of
ramen! Good thing I planned ahead and lost some
weight beforehand!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wh-what should I do?! I was totally and
utterly unprepared for this!
choice_data_list: Don't worry, your weight is well under control!
Don't worry, your weight is well under control!

Just do three ramen bowls' worth of running
later!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-wh-what should I do?! I was totally and
utterly unprepared for this!
choice_data_list: Don't worry, your weight is well under control!
Don't worry, your weight is well under control!

Just do three ramen bowls' worth of running
later!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Color me impressed! To think you have such an
excellent grasp of my physical condition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-although, when I think about it. That in itself is rather
embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh! N-never mind me. I'm merely talking to
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Anyhow, now I can relax and enjoy the cake.
Hehe. ♪ I've waited a long time for this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I enjoy the delectable cake
together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Y-yes, of course. If I run after I eat, I should be able to burn it off before it's too late!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Three servings of noodles would be around 1,030
calories. Therefore, if I run for two hours...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No. I would need to include the broth in that
calculation as well, I'll add an incline dash to my
training too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And then I can do three pork slices' worth of
jogging as a cooldown. My plan is flawless!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With that, I can relax and enjoy the cake. I shall
thoroughly savor it and then properly execute my
plan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Three ramen bowls' worth of running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Mejiro McQueen and I go for a long
run to burn off the calories of exactly three ramen
bowls.
